children.text: the quality of American history, civics, and government education by educating students about the history and principles of the Constitution of the United States, including the Bill of Rights; and
the quality of the teaching of American history, civics, and government in elementary schools and secondary schools, including the teaching of traditional American history.
shall reserve not less than 26 percent for activities under ; andsection 6662 of this title
may reserve not more than 74 percent for activities under .section 6663 of this title
